normalization_point: Samsung SDS-style AI cloud is strong Stage 2; Green waits for actual AI/cloud revenue, ARR, contracts, and FCF.
Douzone-style ERP workflow can be Green-capable only after ARR, churn, OPM, FCF, and workflow lock-in confirm.
Private-equity validation supports Stage 2, but not Green before operating KPIs improve.
AI-cloud capital allocation is a RedTeam overlay when CB, M&A, or capex risks outrun revenue evidence.
Naver HyperCLOVA X is Stage 1/2 before paid B2B API, cloud usage, and AI ad monetization.
Webtoon platform needs paid content, ad revenue, IP adaptation revenue, and OPM/FCF; IPO alone is Stage 2.
Platform overseas expansion must pass privacy, security, and governance gates.
Krafton/Shift Up-style games need repeat bookings and OPM/FCF, not only a hit-title headline.
Single-IP game events stay Watch/Yellow before repeat bookings and retention evidence.
Game release delay, developer lawsuit, and community trust issues are 4C-watch gates.
K-pop can be Stage 2 on IP and China reopening, but Green waits for fan platform, touring, ARPU, and clean governance.
Entertainment platform/IP evidence is capped when founder, governance, or legal risks are active.
Ad/content platform guidance misses are hard RedTeam evidence after IPO or platform repricing.
R8 disclosure confidence is capped when ARR, bookings, contracts, OPM/FCF, security, or legal details are missing.
